commit.message:
SEA-34 fix(ci): fetch git tags for version detection

checkout needs fetch-depth: 0 so git describe --tags can find
the latest release tag. Without it, version falls back to v0.0.0.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: CI上でスクリーンショットを自動生成するように対応 (#5)

* ci: CI上でスクリーンショットを自動生成するように対応

- capture.gd: キャプチャ前に既存の出力ディレクトリのPNGを全削除する _clear_output_dir() を追加
- CI: 最新Godotをダウンロードし、headlessモードでスクリーンショットを生成するステップを追加
- .gitignore: tests/vr_screenshots/ をIgnoreに追加（CI生成物はgit管理不要）
- tests/vr_screenshots/: コミット済みスクリーンショットを削除（CIで毎回生成するため不要）

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* fix(ci): --headless を --display-driver headless に変更してVulkanレンダリングを有効化

--headless は内部で --rendering-driver dummy を強制するため、
SubViewport のテクスチャ取得が失敗していた。
--display-driver headless に変更することでレンダリングドライバの
指定が有効になり、Vulkanでの実レンダリングが可能になる。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* fix(ci): xvfb + OpenGL3 に切り替えてスクリーンショット取得を修正

headless display server + Vulkan の組み合わせはCI環境でVulkanの
初期化に失敗してdummyレンダラーにフォールバックしていた。
xvfb-run で仮想X11ディスプレイを用意し、Mesa ソフトウェア
レンダリング (opengl3) を使うことで実際のレンダリングが可能になる。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

---------

feat: comprehensive QMKL study with BO, 20 kernels, scaling to 12 qubits

New notebook 06_comprehensive_study.ipynb:
- 14 figures covering method comparison, BO convergence, scaling,
  concentration analysis, weight heatmaps, radar charts, and more
- 6 MKL methods compared: Single-Best, Average, Centered, SDP, Projection, BO
- 3 datasets: german_credit, bank_marketing, synthetic
- Scaling study: n_qubits = [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12]
- BO sensitivity analysis: n_calls = [15, 30, 50, 80]
- Fidelity vs Projected kernel comparison

feature_maps.py:
- Add get_extended_feature_map_library() with 20 kernels
  (3 alphas per type, full entanglement ZZ variants)

bayesian_optimizer.py:
- Add get_convergence_history() for plotting convergence curves
- Add get_weight_trajectory() for analyzing BO exploration

visualization.py:

Tune MySQL pool to reduce idle connections and prevent metadata lock contention

Adds maxIdle, idleTimeout, keepAlive settings, and graceful shutdown
handlers to prevent orphaned DB sessions that block DDL operations
(RENAME TABLE) in the update-registrations Cloud Function.

commit.message:
Redesign article typography: Pretendard font + full readability overhaul

- Add Pretendard Variable font (Korean-optimized)
- word-break: keep-all globally
- Article: font-size 1.05rem, line-height 2.0, letter-spacing Korean-optimized
- H2: left-border accent + subtle background highlight
- H3: left border accent
- Blockquotes: callout box style
- Tables: full redesign with hover, rounded corners, green header
- lab-card / lab-formula-box / lab-graph-wrapper: polished styles
- Post list cards: hover lift + shadow
- Mobile table responsiveness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Per-draw snapshots: standalone CSV + metadata after every draw

Each checkpoint now also produces a clean, deduplicated final CSV and
metadata JSON. The metadata records:
- n_bootstrap_completed: actual draws finished so far
- n_bootstrap: total requested draws
- complete: true only when all draws are done

This means results are immediately usable if a job is killed early.
The dispatcher checks "complete": true in metadata before marking a
job as done, so partial snapshots don't prevent re-queuing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add LCNA-INC-2026-008 validation report: luckycommon OpenSearch RED event

Validates original 2026-03-08 incident report against CloudWatch metrics.
Verdict: Scenario C — RED event isolated, but original report omitted 4
additional YELLOW node drop events spanning 162 minutes across 03/07–03/09.

Key findings:
- "Single isolated RED event" → PARTIALLY TRUE (RED isolated; node instability not)
- "No prior ES alerts in 7 days" → FALSE (Events 1 & 2 within 29 hours prior)
- "Node drop 7→6 for 1 minute" → CONFIRMED for Event 3
- "~41 GB ISM deletion" → SUPPORTED by doc count evidence
- "Search latency 8.1ms" → CONFIRMED (measured 8.13ms)

Actions: R1 IAM grant for databasecheck, R2 ISM audit, R3 report addendum,
R4 stagger ISM deletions with 4h+ gap.

commit.message:

Lovable injects its own VITE_SUPABASE_URL at build time, overriding .env.

commit.message:
feat(state): continuous state externalization to survive context compaction (v3.10.4)

New lib/state.sh writes ORCHESTRATOR_STATE.md at key lifecycle moments
(agent launch, status poll, merge) so reinject-context.sh has a fresh
snapshot when Claude Code compacts the session. Reduces the gap between
last known state and compaction to ~30s instead of losing all in-flight
reasoning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Kvm tuning guide (#3196)

* Add KVM/libvirt performance tuning guide for Rocky Linux

Covers NUMA topology, vm.min_free_kbytes dangers, vCPU pinning, CPU isolation,
tuned profiles, GPU passthrough with IOMMU/VFIO, slow boot diagnosis, and
hugepage configuration. Tested on Rocky Linux 8.10, 9.7, and 10.1.

Refs: CUSP-2078

Assisted-by: Claude claude-sonnet-4-6

* Add references, fix fact-verification issues, remove bold formatting

- Add inline superscript references and References section with upstream
  kernel.org and libvirt.org sources (no Red Hat references)
- Fix vfio_virqfd merge version (upstream kernel 6.2, not 5.14)
- Fix rcu_nocbs description (kthreads, not directly to housekeeping CPUs)
- Fix numatune strict mode behavior (OOM killer, not clean startup failure)
- Fix vm.min_free_kbytes terminology (lowmem zones, not all memory zones)
- Remove specific kernel version 5.14.0-558.el9 (unverifiable)
- Remove bold formatting from pinning rules list

Assisted-by: Claude claude-sonnet-4-6
Co-Authored-By: Howard Van Der Wal <hvanderwal@ciq.com>

* Fix vfio_virqfd note based on hardware testing

Testing on 192.168.1.102 with NVIDIA RTX A2000 confirmed:
- Rocky 8.10 (kernel 4.18): vfio_virqfd is a separate module
- Rocky 9.7 (kernel 5.14): vfio_virqfd merged into vfio (RHEL backport)
- Rocky 10.1 (kernel 6.12): vfio_virqfd merged into vfio

Also tested on hardware: IOMMU group listing, GPU hostdev XML,
X-PciMmio64Mb syntax, modprobe/dracut configs, and complete
domain XML definition with libvirt.

  Running AI content review…")

  not on every step update

  Checking HubSpot, Pulling videos, etc.)

commit.message:
JP copy style guide compliance + audit form enhancements + middleware fix

Japanese copy (ja.ts, audit-ja.ts):
- Remove 15 keigo violations (お選びいただけます→選べます, お渡しします→あなたのものです, etc.)
- Replace ソリューション x3 with native Japanese (解決策, 提案)
- Replace unnecessary katakana: パラダイムシフト→発想の転換, ベストバリュー→いちばんお得,
  コミットメント→プラン, エンゲージメント→契約/プロジェクト, ナレッジサイロ→知識の属人化
- Add onomatopoeia for native feel: サクッと, スッと, グッと
- Apply hiragana softening: つくります, かんたん, ずっと
- Fix footer tagline from English imperative structure to natural Japanese
- Remove お客様/御社 from marketing copy (kept in privacy policy)
- Reduce exclamation point overuse in audit sidebar

Audit form (CTO agent):
- Add data maturity step, expanded operations, AI experience questions
- Remove deprecated workflow-demo component
- Middleware simplified to NextResponse.next() passthrough

commit.message:
struttura: colonna Extractive divisa in Occluded e Embedded

Extractive si sdoppia in due sotto-colonne di invisibilità:
- Occluded (structural invisibility): GWS, BEC (Beck - Risk Society)
- Embedded (processual invisibility): SIG, CAP, BAU (Bauman - Liquid Society)
GHO (Data Colonialism) rimosso, da ricollocare.
Matrice passa da 4x6 a 4x7.

fix: 修正 API URL 邏輯 — DEV 時用 localhost:8899，生產用相對路徑

via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

fix: universal merkle tree gadget (#862)

* fix universal merkle tree gadget

* test(merkle-tree): regression test for non-membership proof index forgery

Add `test_non_membership_proof_index_forgery` to cover the soundness bug
fixed in the same PR: `is_non_member` previously ignored `non_elem_idx_var`,
allowing a valid non-membership proof for absent index A to be presented
in-circuit as proof that present index B is absent.

The test builds a tree with an element at index 1, obtains a correct
non-membership proof for absent index 5, then constructs a circuit that
claims index 1 (present) is absent using that proof. The fixed code
rejects it via the new index-consistency check; the original code would
have incorrectly accepted it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* enhance forgery test

* Update merkle_tree/src/gadgets/universal_merkle_tree.rs

Co-authored-by: Phil <philippe@espressosys.com>

* version bump & changelog

fix: Skip archive override in test mode to fix strategy integration tests

active production executors. This broke integration tests since mock
strategies got archived and filtered out. Skip the override when
import.meta.env.MODE is 'test'.

- Replace BLS API calls for ORS with local file — no API quota needed
- Per-occupation ORS data now covers physical demands (21 categories),
  environmental conditions (10), cognitive/mental (12), and
  education/training/experience (5) with detailed estimate breakdowns
- Update OrsSection component to render new structured format with
  category headers and percentage values
- 277 O*NET occupations matched to ORS SOC codes
- Add conversion script at scripts/convert-ors-to-json.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: pvq-tm
repository.description: PVQ-TM: Public Vocational Quotient Transferability Method - Forensic vocational analysis tool for measuring pre/post injury earning capacity

commit.message:
feat(idea-machina): Add Blue Sea Discovery refinement loop

Users can now refine generated directions without losing context:
- Per-direction: textarea + "Tarkenna suuntaa" refines a single direction
- Global: multi-select options + textarea + "Suuntaa ulapalle" refines all 3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Dispatcher: per-server job lists, B=20 for k>=200, B=30 for rest

- Accept optional jobs file as second argument
- get_n_bootstrap() reads config.json to set --n-bootstrap dynamically
- LABGELE: 180 heaviest jobs (k=300, k=200, large-Pareto k=100)
- LESSONIA: 75 lightest jobs (T_eff_e4-6, T_*dim, k=50, k=30)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement WebRTC video streaming client

- Add WebRtcClient with HTTP signaling, auto-reconnect, error states
- Compose UI with SurfaceViewRenderer, aspect-ratio-aware layout
- Connect/disconnect button, configurable server URL
- Dependencies: webrtc-sdk/android 137.7151.05, OkHttp 4.12.0
- Fix dependencyResolutionManagement in settings.gradle.kts
- Remove missing mipmap icon reference from manifest
